explanations.overview: Alt text ensures non-visual users understand image content.

byOptionId.access: Correct â€” alt text aids disabled users and provides fallback descriptions.
byOptionId.style: Incorrect â€” styling is done with CSS, not alt attributes.
byOptionId.seoonly: Incorrect â€” while alt can help SEO, its primary purpose is accessibility.
byOptionId.optional: Incorrect â€” alt is important for accessibility and should usually be provided.

byOptionId.label: Correct â€” <label> elements improve accessibility and clickable area for controls.
